description: Bright, warm, aspirational lifestyle photography. Real people in beautiful spaces. Natural light, earth tones, film-stock quality. The opposite of dark tech.
base_prompt: hyper-realistic lifestyle photograph of {subject} in {space}, {lighting_description}, {mood}, shot on {camera_model}

subject.description: string — person or group, what they're doing. e.g. 'a woman in her early 30s doing morning yoga on a mat'
subject.pose: string — natural, candid-feeling. e.g. 'mid-stretch in warrior II pose, arms extended, looking calmly toward camera-left, weight balanced'
subject.expression: string — genuine emotion. e.g. 'peaceful half-smile, eyes soft and unfocused, completely relaxed jaw'

wardrobe.description: string — fabrics, fits, colors. e.g. 'sage green ribbed tank top, high-waisted cream linen pants, bare feet on natural fiber mat'
wardrobe.jewelry: string or null — e.g. 'single thin gold necklace with small pendant, small gold hoop earrings'
wardrobe.hair: string — e.g. 'dark brown hair in loose low bun, few pieces falling around face naturally'

space.type: string — e.g. 'open-plan mid-century modern living room'
space.architecture: string — e.g. 'floor-to-ceiling windows on two walls, exposed Douglas fir ceiling beams, polished concrete floor with wool area rug'
furnishings: array of specific items. e.g. 'low-profile cream linen sofa with wooden frame', 'round walnut coffee table with single book and ceramic cup', 'woven rattan accent chair in corner'
space.plants: string or null — e.g. 'large fiddle leaf fig in ribbed terracotta pot by window, trailing pothos on floating shelf, small succulent arrangement on coffee table'
space.outside_visible: string or null — e.g. 'lush green garden with mature trees visible through windows, dappled light on foliage'

camera.camera_model: string — e.g. 'Contax T2' for film vibe, 'Canon R5' for crisp digital, 'Mamiya RZ67' for medium format
camera.lens_focal_length_mm: integer — 35 for environmental, 50 for balanced, 85 for intimate
camera.aperture: string — e.g. 'f/2.0' for soft background, 'f/4' for more context
camera.shot_type: string — e.g. 'medium-wide environmental, subject in lower-right third'
camera.film_stock: string or null — e.g. 'Kodak Portra 400 emulation' or 'Fujifilm Pro 400H look'

lighting.source: string — e.g. 'morning sun streaming through east-facing floor-to-ceiling windows'
lighting.quality: string — e.g. 'soft and diffused through sheer linen curtains, creating gentle warm patches on floor and wall, dust motes visible in light beams'
lighting.shadows: string — e.g. 'gentle and open, no harsh contrast, shadows filled by ambient bounce from light walls and ceiling'

palette: 5 hex codes — warm earth tones. e.g. '#F8EAD8', '#DEB887', '#556B2F', '#FFFFFF', '#8B7355'
color_and_style.grade: string — e.g. 'warm and airy, slightly lifted blacks revealing shadow detail, gentle highlight roll-off, +10 warmth in midtones'
color_and_style.grain: string — e.g. 'subtle Portra-style grain, organic texture visible at 100% but not distracting at web size'
color_and_style.overall_style: string — e.g. 'Cereal magazine meets Jenni Kayne lifestyle campaign'

negative_prompt: no harsh flash lighting or on-camera flash look
no plastic or synthetic-looking skin texture
no stock photo staging or forced smiles
no visible brand logos on furniture or decor

morning_yoga.description: Peaceful morning yoga/wellness scene. Warm, serene.

space.type: bright airy studio or living room
space.architecture: large windows, light wood floors, white walls, minimal furniture

lighting.source: early morning sun through east windows
lighting.quality: soft golden light, long shadows, peaceful

color_and_style.grade: warm, lifted shadows, gentle Portra warmth
color_and_style.overall_style: Alo Yoga campaign meets Kinfolk editorial

space.architecture: built-in bookshelves, desk near window, warm wood tones
furnishings: walnut writing desk with brass lamp

lighting.source: afternoon side light through window with wooden blinds creating stripe shadows
lighting.quality: warm and directional, interesting shadow patterns

color_and_style.grade: muted warmth, slightly desaturated, editorial calm
color_and_style.overall_style: The Gentlewoman magazine meets Cereal travel editorial

kitchen_gathering.description: People together in a kitchen. Warmth, community, food.

space.architecture: open shelving, subway tile, butcher block island, pendant lights

lighting.source: combination of window light and warm pendant bulbs above island
lighting.quality: mixed warm sources, cozy and inviting

color_and_style.grade: rich and warm, food-photography warmth, appetizing tones
color_and_style.overall_style: Bon Appétit at-home feature meets Food52 community cooking
